memetic search for the maximum diversity problem](http://www.info.univ-angers.fr/pub/hao/papers/ZhouDuvalHaoIEEE2017.pdf), IEEE
Transactions on Evolutionary Computation, 21(5), 731-745, 2017

your research.  The software is distributed only for academic
purposes. If you wish to use this software for commercial applications,
please obtain permission from Yangming Zhou (zhou.yangming@yahoo.com)
or Jin-Kao Hao (hao@info.univ-angers.fr).
